HGSS.505.0000:
I was hoping to buy some Safari Zone
souvenirs, but it’s not open!\f
I thought it was closed today,
but actually it’s gone!\f
I never saw it coming.
HGSS.505.0001:
The Safari Zone has been moved
to Johto...\f
I hear that now the son of the Warden
is going to run Pal Park!
HGSS.505.0002:
Have you been to the Pal Park?\f
The Safari Zone Warden’s son is
running it with his wife.\f
It must run in their family to
manage parks.
